title: Man Found Hanging From Tree Near In-Laws' House, Family Alleges Murder
description: Farrukhabad (Uttar Pradesh), April 12 (IANS) Panic and tension gripped Jyonta village under the Mohammadabad police station area of Uttar Pradesh’s Farrukhabad district after the body of a 35-year-old man, who had come to visit his in-laws, was found
